tasks.title: Create launcher script and CLI entrypoint skeleton
tasks.notes: Created executable ./tool, Windows companion ./tool.cmd, and skeleton CLI entrypoint at src/cli.ts.

tasks.title: Implement --version and -v flag
tasks.notes: Added CLI support for --version and -v flags, printing fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0 and exiting with code 0.

tasks.title: CLI Launcher and Versioning verification
tasks.notes: build: pass. lint: pass. tests: 21/21 pass. CLI: --version and -v print 'fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0' and exit 0.

tasks.title: Implement help subcommand and --help / -h flags
tasks.notes: Implemented CLI support for help subcommand, --help, and -h flags, printing comprehensive usage details and exiting with code 0.

tasks.title: Help System verification
tasks.notes: build: pass. lint: pass. tests: 21/21 pass. CLI: help command, --help, and -h display usage details and exit 0.

tasks.title: Add blank string validation
tasks.notes: Added argument validation check to cli.ts to reject empty or whitespace-only arguments with a clear error message to stderr and a non-zero exit code.

tasks.title: Implement CLI Unit Tests
tasks.notes: Created tests/cli.test.ts to verify the CLI flags (--version, -v, --help, -h, help) and input validation for empty/blank strings using child_process.execSync.

tasks.title: Input Validation and Unit Tests verification
tasks.notes: build: pass. lint: pass. tests: 28/28 pass. CLI: empty/blank string inputs print an error to stderr and exit with non-zero code; all unit tests verifying version, help, and blank string validation pass.
